---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# op creator

```{julia}
using QuantumToolbox
```

## bosonic

```{julia}
N = 2
0 * qeye(2) # 全0算符
qeye(2^N; dims=(2, 2))        # 单位算符, 但是多体
eye(N)         # qeye 的同义函数
destroy(N)    # 湮灭算符 a
create(N)     # 产生算符 a†
num(N)        # 数算符 a†a
phase(N) # 这个没学过
```

## spin

```{julia}
# basic pauli
sigmax()
sigmay()
sigmaz()
sigmap() # σ+
sigmam() # σ-

# complex situation
jmat(j, :x)
jmat(j, :y)
jmat(j, :z)
jmat(j, :+)
jmat(j, :-)
spin_Jx(j)
spin_Jy(j)
spin_Jz(j)
spin_Jp(j) # J+
spin_Jm(j)
spin_J_set(j) # Jx, Jy, Jz
```

## mulitple system

```{julia}
# kron
A = sigmax()
B = sigmay()
# sample meaning
tensor(A, B)
kron(A, B)
A ⊗ B
```

```{julia}
# mutiple op
qubit_dims = ntuple(_ -> 2, qubit_num)
op1 = 0 * qeye(2^qubit_num; dims=qubit_dims)
```

```{julia}
# multiple site
dims = (2, 3, 4, 2) # general system
op = multisite_operator(dims, 1 => sigmax(), 4 => sigmaz())
# for qubits system
op = multisite_operator(Val(4), 2 => sigmax(), 4 => sigmaz())
```
